creator: thierry@thomas.as
text:
NIC is the Horde's suite of simple network utilities.
	The list of tools includes:

 	. Finger
 	. ICQ lookup
 	. DNS lookup
 	. Email address verification
 	. Ping
 	. SMTP open relay checking
 	. Service status
 	. Traceroute
 	. Whois

How-To-Repeat: 	Pre-requisite: PR ports/33172 must be committed.
